problems.cause: THROT.Actual is not a visible port; AGREE annex references Actual_Speed.val but AADL connection uses THROT.Actual which has incompatible type with Actual_Speed.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the AGREE annex block entirely and re-declare it under Car.Car_Impl with valid visible port references only.

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 35: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.
problems.cause: CNTRL.Target port type does not match Target_Speed's type; AGREE annex assumes Target_Speed.val but connection binds to subcomponent port with incompatible type.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the AGREE annex block entirely and re-declare it under Car.Car_Impl with valid visible port references only.

problems.cause: SM.State_Out is not a visible port; AGREE annex references const_tar_speed as a constant but it is not derived from any visible input or state.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the AGREE annex block entirely and re-declare it under Car.Car_Impl with valid visible port references only.

executor_steps: Delete the existing annex agree block from Car (component type) because it references subcomponent ports and const declarations not visible at component type level.
Create a new annex agree block in Car.Car_Impl (implementation) with only visible ports: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, Target_Tire_Pitch, Actual_Tire_Pitch, State_Signal.
Rewrite the assume and guarantee clauses to use only visible ports and avoid const declarations of boolean state unless derived from visible inputs.
Replace 'const const_tar_speed: bool = true;' with a proper assumption based on visible input or remove it if not derivable from visible signals.

Rewrite 'guarantee "acceleration_constraint": const_tar_speed => (Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val)) < max_accel;' to use a visible max_accel constant or remove if not defined in visible scope.
Ensure all references in the new annex use only the exact visible identifiers: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, Target_Tire_Pitch, Actual_Tire_Pitch, State_Signal.
